$schema: Interaction sequence for driving VM workload testing.

$actions.delay: Wait a fixed number of seconds. Parameters: seconds (number).
$actions.key: Send a single keystroke. Parameters: name (string). Supported: Enter, Tab, Space, Escape, Up, Down, Left, Right, F1-F12.
$actions.type: Type a text string. Parameters: text (string), sensitive (boolean, masks output), charDelayMs (number, default 50).
$actions.typeAndEnter: Type a text string, wait, then press Enter. Parameters: text (string), sensitive (boolean, masks output), charDelayMs (number, default 50), delaySeconds (number, default 2).
$actions.screenshot: Capture a screenshot for debugging. Parameters: label (string).
$actions.waitForText: Capture + OCR the VM screen until pattern appears.
$actions.waitForAndEnter: Wait for text on screen via OCR, then type and press Enter.
$actions.waitForPort: Wait until a TCP port responds on the VM.
$actions.waitForHeartbeat: Wait for Hyper-V Integration Services heartbeat.
$actions.waitForVMStop: Wait until the VM reaches the Off/stopped state.
$actions.fetchAndExecute: Type a command + Enter, then wait for a completion pattern.

description: Ubuntu Server (with ubuntu-desktop): log in with new password, install VS Code. Same post-install workload as guest.ubuntu.desktop — ubuntu-desktop behaves identically whichever ISO seeded it.

steps.description: Password (already changed on first login during Test-Start)
Install VS Code — reuse desktop workload script.
